title: 40 Stations in Telangana Identified for Developing under Amrit Bharat Scheme
description: Development works at half a dozen stations - Begumpet, Hafeezpet, Karimnagar, Ramagundam, Sri Bala Brahmeswara Jogulamba and Warangal railway stations under Amrit Bharat Station scheme have been taken up at a good pace: Ashwini Vaishnaw
